---
title: Publications
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    css: pubs.css
---

```{r reading_pubs_file}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

source("publications/pubs_helpers.R")
bib <- read_bib("publications/Website.bib")
```


```{r rendering_pubs}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
#| message: false
#| warning: false

years <- get_years(bib)

for (yy in years) {
  entries <- bib[which(vapply(bib, get_year, integer(1)) == yy)]
  entries <- entries[!vapply(entries, has_excluded_author, logical(1))]
  if (length(entries) == 0) next

  cat(sprintf("\n\n## %d\n\n", yy))
  cat('<div class="pub-year">\n')

  for (e in entries) {
    title <- clean_title(e$title)
    link  <- best_link(e)
    auth  <- highlight_authors(author_string(e))
    venue <- get_venue(e)

    title_html <- if (!is.null(link)) {
      sprintf(
        '<a class="pub-title" href="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener">%s</a>',
        link, title
      )
    } else {
      sprintf('<span class="pub-title">%s</span>', title)
    }

    venue_html <- if (nzchar(venue)) {
      sprintf('<span class="pub-venue"><em>%s</em>. %d</span>', venue, yy)
    } else {
      sprintf('<span class="pub-venue">%d</span>', yy)
    }

    cat('<div class="pub-item">\n')
    cat(sprintf('  <div class="pub-title-row">%s</div>\n', title_html))
    if (nzchar(auth)) cat(sprintf('  <div class="pub-authors">%s</div>\n', auth))
    cat(sprintf('  <div class="pub-meta">%s</div>\n', venue_html))
    cat("</div>\n\n")
  }

  cat("</div>\n")
}
```

```{r callout_issues}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
#| message: false
#| warning: false

issues <- check_bib(bib)

has_issues <- any(lengths(issues) > 0)

if (has_issues) {
  cat("::: {.callout-warning}\n")
  cat("## BibTeX sanity check\n\n")

  if (length(issues$missing_year)) {
    cat("**Missing year:**\n\n")
    cat(paste0("- `", issues$missing_year, "`\n", collapse = ""))
    cat("\n")
  }

  if (length(issues$missing_title)) {
    cat("**Missing title:**\n\n")
    cat(paste0("- `", issues$missing_title, "`\n", collapse = ""))
    cat("\n")
  }

  if (length(issues$missing_link)) {
    cat("**No DOI/URL/arXiv link found (optional):**\n\n")
    cat(paste0("- `", issues$missing_link, "`\n", collapse = ""))
    cat("\n")
  }

  cat(":::\n")
}
```
